params._actionDelay: Delay before steward actions can execute (veto window)

electSteward(address).notice: Elect a new steward (called by timelock after governance proposal)

executeAction(uint256).notice: Execute a proposed steward action (after delay, if not vetoed)

proposeAction(address,bytes,uint256).notice: Propose a steward action (queued for veto window)

removeSteward().notice: Remove the current steward (called by timelock after governance proposal)

vetoAction(uint256).notice: Veto a steward action (called by timelock after governance proposal)
